Your watchlist will sync to a private GitHub Gist — accessible from any device. Takes 30 seconds to set up.
How to get your token:
  1. Go to github.com/settings/tokens/new
  2. Give it a name e.g. PSX Dashboard
  3. Set expiration to No expiration

  5. Click Generate token and copy it
